subject: Winter showcase prep — where we stand
snippet: Hey Jason, just wanted to check in on where things stand with the winter showcase. We're about two weeks out from the…
body:
Hey Jason, just wanted to check in on where things stand with the winter showcase. We're about two weeks out from the venue's tech deadline and I want to make sure we're on track with casting and the running order.

Chris

subject: Re: Winter showcase prep — where we stand
snippet: Hi Chris, we're actually in pretty good shape. The corps choreography is set and we're in final rehearsals on the Act…
body:
Hi Chris, we're actually in pretty good shape. The corps choreography is set and we're in final rehearsals on the Act II variations. I'm expecting to have casting locked by the end of the week.

Jason

subject: Faculty meeting Thursday
snippet: Hey Jason, I'm putting together the agenda for Thursday's faculty meeting and want to get it circulated by end of day…
body:
Hey Jason, I'm putting together the agenda for Thursday's faculty meeting and want to get it circulated by end of day tomorrow. So far I've got the winter season repertoire review and the spring class schedule.

Chris

subject: Re: Faculty meeting Thursday
snippet: Good call on circulating early. I'd like to add a quick item on the rehearsal schedule — we've had a few questions…
body:
Good call on circulating early. I'd like to add a quick item on the rehearsal schedule — we've had a few questions from parents about the extra Saturday blocks and it would help to get everyone aligned.

Jason

subject: Re: Faculty meeting Thursday
snippet: Both added. I also shifted the registration item to the second slot since it tends to run long — better to have it in…
body:
Both added. I also shifted the registration item to the second slot since it tends to run long — better to have it in the middle than right at the end.

See you Thursday.

Chris

subject: Director check-in prep
snippet: Hey, didn't you say your check-in with Diane is on Friday? Just wanted to make sure you're actually planning to prep…
body:
Hey, didn't you say your check-in with Diane is on Friday? Just wanted to make sure you're actually planning to prep for it this time. Last term you felt like you walked in with nothing to say.

Sarah

subject: Re: Director check-in prep
snippet: Good reminder — I was honestly thinking about letting it slide this week since things have been so hectic with the…
body:
Good reminder — I was honestly thinking about letting it slide this week since things have been so hectic with the showcase. But you're right, I should use the time.

I definitely want to raise the staffing thing — we badly need another instructor for the beginner sections.

Jason

subject: Re: Director check-in prep
snippet: Yes, definitely raise the staffing thing. You've been stretched thin for weeks and I don't think Diane even knows how…
body:
Yes, definitely raise the staffing thing. You've been stretched thin for weeks and I don't think Diane even knows how full your classes have gotten.

Also, maybe mention the waitlist — that's a good argument for hiring.

Sarah

subject: Re: Director check-in prep
snippet: You're right on both counts. I'll draft some bullet points tonight after the kids are down. Thanks for the nudge — I…
body:
You're right on both counts. I'll draft some bullet points tonight after the kids are down. Thanks for the nudge — I genuinely would have let this one slide.

Jason

subject: Clearance renewal reminder
snippet: Hey, did you ever finish that child-safety clearance renewal that was due last week? I saw a reminder email pop up on…
body:
Hey, did you ever finish that child-safety clearance renewal that was due last week? I saw a reminder email pop up on your laptop this morning.

You can't be on the studio floor with the kids' classes if it lapses.

Sarah

subject: Re: Clearance renewal reminder
snippet: Ugh, I completely forgot about that. I'll log in tonight and get it done — I think the mandated-reporter module is…
body:
Ugh, I completely forgot about that. I'll log in tonight and get it done — I think the mandated-reporter module is only about an hour.

Thanks for catching it. I didn't even see the reminder.

Jason

subject: Re: Clearance renewal reminder
snippet: There's actually a second module too, I think — the safeguarding one. The original email mentioned two separate…
body:
There's actually a second module too, I think — the safeguarding one. The original email mentioned two separate courses that both need to be completed before the clearance renews.

Sarah

subject: Re: Clearance renewal reminder
snippet: Good to know. I logged in and can see both modules listed. The mandated-reporter one is done — just the safeguarding…
body:
Good to know. I logged in and can see both modules listed. The mandated-reporter one is done — just the safeguarding module left. Should be able to finish it during lunch tomorrow.

Jason

subject: Re: Clearance renewal reminder
snippet: Nice work. Let me know when it's fully wrapped up.
body:
Nice work. Let me know when it's fully wrapped up.

Also, download or screenshot the completion certificates when you finish — the studio office has a habit of losing track of who's current.

Sarah

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: Dude, it feels like forever since we've actually grabbed a meal together. Any ch...
body:
Dude, it feels like forever since we've actually grabbed a meal together. Any chance you're free Thursday or Friday this week?

I'm thinking that ramen spot on Fulton you've been wanting to try. Heard the tonkotsu there is legit.

Mike

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Thursday works perfectly. I'm slammed in meetings all morning but should be free...
body:
Thursday works perfectly. I'm slammed in meetings all morning but should be free by noon. That ramen place has been on my list forever — let's finally do it.

Meet you there at 12?

Jason

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Hey man, I've been meaning to reach out for a while. Life has been a lot lately ...
body:
Hey man, I've been meaning to reach out for a while. Life has been a lot lately and I could really use a proper catch-up with someone who actually knows me.

You free for coffee next Tuesday morning? The place by the park works for me if it's not too far out of your way.

Mike

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Tuesday works great. I can do 8:30 before I need to be at the studio — I don't teach until the afternoon most days so…
body:
Tuesday works great. I can do 8:30 before I need to be at the studio — I don't teach until the afternoon most days so my mornings are flexible.

The park place sounds good, I haven't been there in a while. See you then.

Jason

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet:
Perfect. 8:30, park place, Tuesday. It's locked in.

And bring your actual self,...
body:
Perfect. 8:30, park place, Tuesday. It's locked in.

And bring your actual self, not the everything's-fine version. I want to hear what's really going on with you.

Mike

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Okay so Carla's birthday is the 12th and I want to do something proper for her. ...
body:
Okay so Carla's birthday is the 12th and I want to do something proper for her. I was thinking brunch at that place in the Heights — the one with the bottomless mimosas and the eggs Benedict everyone goes on about.

You in? And are you bringing Sarah?

Mike

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Absolutely in. Sarah would love it too — she and Carla really hit it off at the ...
body:
Absolutely in. Sarah would love it too — she and Carla really hit it off at the summer cookout and she's been wanting to hang again.

What time are you thinking? I'd say 11 is the sweet spot for brunch.

Jason

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: 11 works perfectly. I'm going to book for about 8 people — you and Sarah, me, Ca...
body:
11 works perfectly. I'm going to book for about 8 people — you and Sarah, me, Carla, and a few others from the old crew. I'll get the reservation sorted and send over details once it's confirmed.

Should I start a new group chat for logistics, or is everyone still in the old one?

Mike

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Start a new one — the old group chat has been dead for months. Add Sarah too so ...
body:
Start a new one — the old group chat has been dead for months. Add Sarah too so she's in the loop from the beginning.

Also let me know if you want to go in together on a gift. Happy to split something nice with you for Carla.

Jason

subject: Renewal options
snippet: Hey, got an email from the home security company — our subscription auto-renews ...
body:
Hey, got an email from the home security company — our subscription auto-renews in 30 days and the new rate is jumping to $49/month. That's a meaningful increase from what we're paying now.

I found a couple of alternatives that look cheaper. Should we shop around or try to negotiate a better rate with our current provider first?

Sarah

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Definitely worth looking into alternatives. I've been meaning to revisit that su...
body:
Definitely worth looking into alternatives. I've been meaning to revisit that subscription anyway.

Which services did you find? I want to make sure we don't lose the professional monitoring or the app integration — those are the two features I actually use on a regular basis.

Jason

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: I found two options. One is $29/month but doesn't have app integration — just th...
body:
I found two options. One is $29/month but doesn't have app integration — just the monitoring. The other is $35/month and includes everything we currently have: monitoring, the app, and the door sensors.

Both have solid reviews. I'm leaning toward the $35 one since we'd still save $14 a month compared to the renewal price.

Sarah

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Yeah, the $35 option makes the most sense — I'm not willing to give up the app, ...
body:
Yeah, the $35 option makes the most sense — I'm not willing to give up the app, especially when I travel. And $14/month in savings is still real money over a year.

Before we commit, can you check if there's a cancellation fee or a long-term contract? I want to make sure we have flexibility if it doesn't work out.

Jason

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Just checked — no cancellation fee and it goes month-to-month after the first 90...
body:
Just checked — no cancellation fee and it goes month-to-month after the first 90 days. That's about as flexible as it gets.

I'll kick off the switch this week and cancel the current plan before the renewal date so we don't get charged for another cycle.

Sarah

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Hey, we got an invoice from the landscaping company for $380 but I'm pretty sure...
body:
Hey, we got an invoice from the landscaping company for $380 but I'm pretty sure the agreed quote was $250 for the last visit. The invoice doesn't break down what the extra $130 is for.

Do you remember what the original quote said? I want to call them before I pay anything.

Sarah

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: I have the original quote email somewhere — I'll dig it up tonight. I think the ...
body:
I have the original quote email somewhere — I'll dig it up tonight. I think the base was $250 but there was an add-on for edging, which they did end up doing. That might explain part of the difference, but $380 still sounds high.

Don't pay it yet. Let me pull up the email and we can call them together tomorrow.

Jason

subject: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: The renewal paperwork came today. They're offering a 12-month renewal at $2,350/...
body:
The renewal paperwork came today. They're offering a 12-month renewal at $2,350/month (up from $2,200) or month-to-month at $2,500. They need a response by the 15th.

I know we've talked loosely about possibly buying this year. What are you thinking? I don't want to lock into 12 months if we're actually serious about it.

Sarah

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Yeah, I'd rather not commit to another full year if buying is genuinely on the t...
body:
Yeah, I'd rather not commit to another full year if buying is genuinely on the table. But month-to-month at $2,500 is painful.

Is it worth asking about a 6-month lease? Some landlords will negotiate, especially with reliable tenants. Worth emailing the property manager before we decide either way.

Jason

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Good idea, I'll reach out to the property manager today and see if a 6-month ter...
body:
Good idea, I'll reach out to the property manager today and see if a 6-month term is an option.

While we're at it, do you want to finally set up that call with the mortgage broker? We keep saying we'll do it. Might as well get a real picture of what we're working with before the 15th deadline.

Sarah

subject: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Sending you a couple of things from my feeds this week that I think you'll actua...
body:
Sending you a couple of things from my feeds this week that I think you'll actually want to read. First one is a piece on AI adoption in fintech — it's pretty relevant to what your team has been working on and some of the friction points sound very familiar.

The second is about regenerative travel, which got me genuinely excited about where we go next. Read it before I say anything else.

Sarah

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: The fintech piece is really good — I shared it with a couple of the faculty and got a good discussion going in the…
body:
The fintech piece is really good — I shared it with a couple of the faculty and got a good discussion going in the studio office.

The travel one got me too. Where did it get you thinking? Because I've been loosely eyeing Portugal or Costa Rica for next year.

Jason

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Portugal! I've wanted to go for literally years. The food, the history, warm wea...
body:
Portugal! I've wanted to go for literally years. The food, the history, warm weather, not overcrowded if you time it right. I already bookmarked five articles.

We should actually look at dates this time instead of just talking about it. Spring maybe?

Sarah

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Spring in Portugal sounds incredible. Let's block some time this weekend to sit ...
body:
Spring in Portugal sounds incredible. Let's block some time this weekend to sit down with our calendars and figure out what's actually realistic — no more just talking about it.

Send me those articles, I want to start getting a feel for the different regions.

Jason

subject: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Hey, quick heads-up on this week. I have a client at 3:30 on Wednesday and another at 4 on Friday, so I can't do…
body:
Hey, quick heads-up on this week. I have a client at 3:30 on Wednesday and another at 4 on Friday, so I can't do school pickup either day.

Emily gets out at 3:15 and Tyler's pickup is 3:30. Can you cover both, or do we need to figure out a backup?

Sarah

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Wednesday I can do — I'll shift my afternoon class to the morning. Friday is trickier, I have a rehearsal that tends…
body:
Wednesday I can do — I'll shift my afternoon class to the morning. Friday is trickier, I have a rehearsal that tends to run long and I can't always step away.

Is there any chance your 4pm client wraps by 4:30? Or should I check with my mom? She mentioned recently that she doesn't see the kids enough.

Jason

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: The Friday one is a new patient so I really don't want to rush her out. Let's as...
body:
The Friday one is a new patient so I really don't want to rush her out. Let's ask your mom.

Actually — could she do both days? We could take her to dinner Sunday as a thank-you, she'd love that. And you're right, she has been saying she misses them.

Sarah

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Ha, she will absolutely say yes. Texting her now.
body:
Ha, she will absolutely say yes. Texting her now.

What time should I tell her to be at Emily's school on Wednesday? And dinner Sunday works — I'll set it up.

Jason

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Tell her 3:10 to be safe — parking gets chaotic at Fairview Academy and I don't want her stressed. Emily's teacher is…
body:
Tell her 3:10 to be safe — parking gets chaotic at Fairview Academy and I don't want her stressed. Emily's teacher is Ms. Alvarez if she needs to check in at the front office.

Also remind her to use the Fairview Academy main entrance on Fairmount, not the side door — she used the wrong one last time and it was a whole ordeal.

Sarah

subject: Family vacation planning
snippet: I started a shared doc for the summer trip and dropped it in the family folder. ...
body:
I started a shared doc for the summer trip and dropped it in the family folder. I found flight options for the week of August 10th — the best deal is $640 per person roundtrip out of Terminal B.

I also added three Airbnb options at different price points with notes on each. Can you take a look tonight and tell me what you think?

Sarah

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: Just went through it — the flights on the 10th work great and I'd go with the mi...
body:
Just went through it — the flights on the 10th work great and I'd go with the mid-range Airbnb. It has the space we need without going overboard on price.

One thing before we book anything: I want to double-check Emily's swim camp end date. I think she's done by the 9th but let me confirm with the schedule first.

Jason

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: What are we thinking for this weekend? The kids have been asking about the scien...
body:
What are we thinking for this weekend? The kids have been asking about the science museum and I know you mentioned wanting to catch the game Saturday afternoon.

I was thinking museum in the morning, game in the afternoon, and then a low-key Sunday with nothing on the calendar. Does that work?

Sarah

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: That sounds like a perfect Saturday honestly. Museum opens at 10 — we could do t...
body:
That sounds like a perfect Saturday honestly. Museum opens at 10 — we could do two or three hours and be home by 1 with plenty of time before the 2pm kickoff.

For Sunday I'd love to just fire up the grill and stay in the backyard all day. Nowhere to be, nothing planned.

Jason

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Done, that's the plan. I'll pack snacks for the museum so we're not buying overp...
body:
Done, that's the plan. I'll pack snacks for the museum so we're not buying overpriced hot dogs in there.

Can you grab stuff for the grill Sunday? I'm thinking burgers and that corn salad you make — the kids always go crazy for it.

Sarah

subject: Studio calendar — holiday closures
snippet: Jason, before I post the winter calendar, can you confirm the studio is closed December 24 through January 1? A few…
body:
Jason, before I post the winter calendar, can you confirm the studio is closed December 24 through January 1? A few parents have already asked about the make-up week for missed classes.

Chris

subject: New adult beginner ballet — Tuesday slot
snippet: We've got enough interest to open a second adult beginner section. I was thinking Tuesdays at 7pm in Studio B. Does…
body:
We've got enough interest to open a second adult beginner section. I was thinking Tuesdays at 7pm in Studio B. Does that clash with your intermediate rehearsal?

Chris

subject: Sprung floor quote for Studio A
snippet: The contractor came back with a quote for resurfacing the Studio A marley. It's a little higher than last year. I'll…
body:
The contractor came back with a quote for resurfacing the Studio A marley. It's a little higher than last year. I'll forward the breakdown so we can decide before the spring term.

Chris

subject: Guest teacher for the pointe master class
snippet: Are you still hoping to bring in a guest for the pointe master class? If so I need a name and date this week to get…
body:
Are you still hoping to bring in a guest for the pointe master class? If so I need a name and date this week to get it on the schedule and into the newsletter.

Chris

subject: Front desk coverage next week
snippet: Patricia is out Monday and Tuesday, so we're short at the front desk. Any chance you can start your afternoon block a…
body:
Patricia is out Monday and Tuesday, so we're short at the front desk. Any chance you can start your afternoon block a bit later so someone can cover check-in?

Chris

subject: Emily's ballet shoes
snippet: Emily grew out of her ballet flats again. Can you grab the right size from the studio shop, or should I order online?…
body:
Emily grew out of her ballet flats again. Can you grab the right size from the studio shop, or should I order online? She needs them before class Monday.

Sarah

subject: Tyler's science project
snippet: Tyler's science project is due Friday and he's stuck on the poster. Can you help him after dinner tonight? I've got a…
body:
Tyler's science project is due Friday and he's stuck on the poster. Can you help him after dinner tonight? I've got a late client.

Sarah

subject: Barbara for dinner Sunday
snippet: Your mom wants to come for Sunday dinner and offered to bring dessert. Should I make the roast, or do you want to…
body:
Your mom wants to come for Sunday dinner and offered to bring dessert. Should I make the roast, or do you want to grill if the weather holds?

Sarah

subject: Showcase tickets for the family
snippet: How many showcase tickets should I set aside for our side? Barbara, my parents, and maybe my sister. I want to…
body:
How many showcase tickets should I set aside for our side? Barbara, my parents, and maybe my sister. I want to reserve before they sell out.

Sarah

subject: Dentist for the kids
snippet: Both kids are due for cleanings. The only back-to-back slot they had is a Thursday afternoon. Can you do pickup that…
body:
Both kids are due for cleanings. The only back-to-back slot they had is a Thursday afternoon. Can you do pickup that day so I can take them?

Sarah

subject: Fairview conference night
snippet: Parent-teacher conferences at Fairview Academy are next Tuesday evening. Can you get out of the studio by six so we…
body:
Parent-teacher conferences at Fairview Academy are next Tuesday evening. Can you get out of the studio by six so we can go together?

Sarah

subject: Grocery list
snippet: Adding to the list before you go: coffee, oat milk, chicken, and something for Tyler's lunches. He's refusing…
body:
Adding to the list before you go: coffee, oat milk, chicken, and something for Tyler's lunches. He's refusing sandwiches again this week.

Sarah

subject: Car service Saturday
snippet: The car's overdue for its oil change. Can you drop it off Saturday morning before your rehearsal? They open at eight.
body:
The car's overdue for its oil change. Can you drop it off Saturday morning before your rehearsal? They open at eight.

Sarah

subject: Emily's solo nerves
snippet: Emily's been anxious about her solo in the showcase. Could you run through it with her at home this week? She listens…
body:
Emily's been anxious about her solo in the showcase. Could you run through it with her at home this week? She listens to you more than me on the dance stuff.

Sarah

subject: Keystone Arts spring collaboration
snippet: Would Parkside be up for a joint piece at the Keystone spring gala? We could pair a few of your advanced dancers with…
body:
Would Parkside be up for a joint piece at the Keystone spring gala? We could pair a few of your advanced dancers with our company for one number.

Mike

subject: Studio space swap
snippet: Our black box is free most Sunday mornings if you ever need overflow rehearsal space. In exchange we might borrow…
body:
Our black box is free most Sunday mornings if you ever need overflow rehearsal space. In exchange we might borrow your marley for a weekend intensive.

Mike

subject: That choreographer I mentioned
snippet: I finally got the contact for the contemporary choreographer from the festival. She's Philly-based and looking for…
body:
I finally got the contact for the contemporary choreographer from the festival. She's Philly-based and looking for guest work. Want me to introduce you?

Mike

subject: Coffee before the arts council meeting
snippet: You free for coffee before Thursday's arts council meeting? I want to compare notes on the grant application before…
body:
You free for coffee before Thursday's arts council meeting? I want to compare notes on the grant application before we're in the room.

Mike

subject: Comps to our fall program
snippet: Holding two comps for you and Sarah for our fall program. It's a mixed bill, some new work. Let me know if you can…
body:
Holding two comps for you and Sarah for our fall program. It's a mixed bill, some new work. Let me know if you can make opening night.

Mike

subject: Sound equipment loan
snippet: We just upgraded our portable speakers, so the old set is going spare. If Parkside wants them for outdoor rehearsals…
body:
We just upgraded our portable speakers, so the old set is going spare. If Parkside wants them for outdoor rehearsals they're yours.

Mike

subject: Reference for a student
snippet: One of my students is applying to a summer program and listed you as a reference from the workshop last year. Are you…
body:
One of my students is applying to a summer program and listed you as a reference from the workshop last year. Are you okay if she uses your name?

Mike

subject: We should catch up soon
snippet: It's been too long. Carla keeps asking when we're all getting together. Are you and Sarah around any weekend this…
body:
It's been too long. Carla keeps asking when we're all getting together. Are you and Sarah around any weekend this month?

Mike

subject: Grant deadline Friday
snippet: Heads up, the small-ensemble grant closes Friday. I know Parkside was thinking of applying for the showcase. Happy to…
body:
Heads up, the small-ensemble grant closes Friday. I know Parkside was thinking of applying for the showcase. Happy to look over your draft.

Mike

subject: Weekend with the kids
snippet: The kids want to do the art museum Saturday. If you're rehearsing in the morning we could go after lunch and let you…
body:
The kids want to do the art museum Saturday. If you're rehearsing in the morning we could go after lunch and let you join. Thoughts?

Sarah

subject: Barbara's piano recital
snippet: Your mom mentioned she's playing at the Rittenhouse recital next month and would love us all there. Can we make it…
body:
Your mom mentioned she's playing at the Rittenhouse recital next month and would love us all there. Can we make it work around the showcase schedule?

Sarah

subject: Heating bill again
snippet: The heating bill jumped this month. I think the thermostat schedule reset. Can you look at it tonight before we get…
body:
The heating bill jumped this month. I think the thermostat schedule reset. Can you look at it tonight before we get another one like this?

Sarah

subject: Tyler's spring soccer
snippet: Tyler wants to sign up for spring soccer. Practices are Wednesdays, which clashes with your late class. Can we figure…
body:
Tyler wants to sign up for spring soccer. Practices are Wednesdays, which clashes with your late class. Can we figure out who drives him?

Sarah

subject: Anniversary dinner Friday
snippet: I made a reservation for our anniversary at the little Italian place Friday. Can you make sure you're clear of the…
body:
I made a reservation for our anniversary at the little Italian place Friday. Can you make sure you're clear of the studio by seven? No rehearsals running late.

Sarah

subject: Emily's costume hem
snippet: Emily's showcase costume is too long. Do they hem it at the studio or should I take it to the tailor? Don't want her…
body:
Emily's showcase costume is too long. Do they hem it at the studio or should I take it to the tailor? Don't want her tripping on stage.

Sarah

subject: Tyler's follow-up appointment
snippet: The pediatrician wants Tyler back for a quick follow-up on his ear. It's fifteen minutes. Which morning can you cover…
body:
The pediatrician wants Tyler back for a quick follow-up on his ear. It's fifteen minutes. Which morning can you cover the studio drop-off?

Sarah

subject: Showcase volunteer sheet
snippet: The parent volunteer sheet for the showcase went around. Should I put us down for the ticket table or the concession…
body:
The parent volunteer sheet for the showcase went around. Should I put us down for the ticket table or the concession stand? I can only do one.

Sarah

subject: Plumber Monday or Thursday
snippet: The kitchen faucet is dripping again. The plumber can come Monday or Thursday. Which day are you home in the…
body:
The kitchen faucet is dripping again. The plumber can come Monday or Thursday. Which day are you home in the afternoon?

Sarah

subject: Kids' spring break
snippet: Fairview Academy's spring break is the third week of March. Should we plan something small with the kids, or is that…
body:
Fairview Academy's spring break is the third week of March. Should we plan something small with the kids, or is that a heavy rehearsal stretch for you?

Sarah

subject: Emily's reading log
snippet: Emily needs a signature on her Fairview reading log every night this week. Can you sign it when you tuck her in on…
body:
Emily needs a signature on her Fairview reading log every night this week. Can you sign it when you tuck her in on your late nights?

Sarah

subject: New winter coats
snippet: Both kids need new winter coats — last year's don't fit. Can we go this weekend, or should I just order and return…
body:
Both kids need new winter coats — last year's don't fit. Can we go this weekend, or should I just order and return what doesn't work?

Sarah

subject: Barbara's prescription
snippet: Barbara asked if one of us could pick up her prescription from the Rittenhouse pharmacy. I can't get there before it…
body:
Barbara asked if one of us could pick up her prescription from the Rittenhouse pharmacy. I can't get there before it closes. Can you swing by after the studio?

Sarah

subject: Tyler's sleepover Saturday
snippet: Tyler's been invited to a sleepover Saturday. His friend's mom offered to drive. Are you okay with it, or do you want…
body:
Tyler's been invited to a sleepover Saturday. His friend's mom offered to drive. Are you okay with it, or do you want to meet them first?

Sarah

subject: Studio parking pass
snippet: Did your studio parking pass expire? I got a ticket parked near there last week and want to make sure ours is current…
body:
Did your studio parking pass expire? I got a ticket parked near there last week and want to make sure ours is current before I drop off Emily.

Sarah

subject: Flowers after the showcase
snippet: Should we order flowers for Emily after the showcase, or is that not a thing for the younger dancers? I don't want to…
body:
Should we order flowers for Emily after the showcase, or is that not a thing for the younger dancers? I don't want to embarrass her but I also don't want to miss it.

Sarah

subject: Meal plan this week
snippet: I'm doing the meal plan tonight. Any requests? I was thinking the sheet-pan chicken you liked and maybe soup for your…
body:
I'm doing the meal plan tonight. Any requests? I was thinking the sheet-pan chicken you liked and maybe soup for your late rehearsal nights.

Sarah

subject: Emily's friend over Friday
snippet: Emily wants a friend from Fairview over after class Friday. Can you bring them both back from the studio, or should…
body:
Emily wants a friend from Fairview over after class Friday. Can you bring them both back from the studio, or should the other mom pick up?

body:

body:

body:
Winter enrollment closed a little ahead of last year. Ballet and contemporary are nearly full; the jazz sections still have room. Full breakdown attached.

Reminder that parent viewing week starts Monday. Can you let your classes know families will be observing the last fifteen minutes? A few instructors forgot last term.

subject: Fwd: PhilaSport partnership buy-in + my benefits summary
snippet: Forwarding what the practice sent over. Base is $105,000 and the buy-in is $40,000 due at signing...
body:
Jason, forwarding what Marcus sent over so it is not just sitting in my inbox.

Current base salary: $105,000.
Partnership buy-in: $40,000 one-time, due at signing.
What changes: I move from salaried PT to partner. I keep the $105,000 base and add a partner distribution, projected around $16,000 to $20,000 a year depending on clinic profit. Health and dental continue unchanged.

Can we look at whether we can actually swing the $40,000 without touching the kids 529s?

Sarah
